title: Jwssor Pink Tissue Paper,30sheets Pink Wrapping Paper,50x35cm Multi Colored Tissue Paper
features: ❤【Pink Wrapping Paper】:It contains 30 sheets pink tissue paper,light pink 10sheets,middle pink 10 sheets,hot pink 10 sheets.
❤【Quality】:The tissue paper is made of paper with a weight of 17g,which has moisture-proof and breathable functions and good flatness,and can be used for product shaping.
❤【Size】:The size of this tissue paper is 50*35cm/20*14inch,the size is suitable for packing most of products,and the paper is easy to cut,you can adjust it according to your needs.

❤【Application】:The tissue paper can be used to pack any gifts you want,like shoe boxes,gifts.And the tissue paper is suitable for Valentine’s Day,Christmas,Thanksgiving day,birthday parties,wedding party favors.
❤【Customer Service】:If you have any questions,please feel free to contact us,we will try our best to solve it for you,and we would like to full refund for you.
